properties.name: pr. Nakhimova 82
properties.summary: 36-flat building destroyed March 2022, demolished by occupation order. Same footprint rebuilt under a new address.
properties.source: project spine, property_id 5865, geocode confidence high

properties.name: per. Chernomorsky 1B
properties.summary: 51-flat building, new address and cadastral number, ~10m from the original footprint. 94.3% sold, overwhelmingly to Russian buyers.
properties.source: project spine, property_id 6333, geocode confidence high

properties.name: pr. Lenina (Myru) 104
properties.summary: Named in one demolition decree with 106/108/110. Fate: not confirmed razed, but ownership stripped via the registry regardless.
properties.source: project spine, property_id 4417, geocode confidence high

properties.name: pr. Lenina (Myru) 106
properties.summary: Decreed for demolition, restored in place instead, residents barred from the site. Courtyard recorded as a makeshift grave site, 2022.
properties.source: project spine, property_id 4419, geocode confidence high

properties.name: pr. Lenina (Myru) 108
properties.summary: Only partially demolished — one entrance/section torn down, the rest of the tower left standing. Apartments stripped via the registry regardless.
properties.source: project spine, property_id 4421, geocode confidence high

properties.name: pr. Lenina (Myru) 110
properties.summary: Not confirmed razed at all. Hundreds of apartments across all four buildings stripped via the ownerless registry regardless of physical fate.
properties.source: project spine, property_id 4423, geocode confidence high

properties.name: prosp. Stroiteley 108
properties.summary: 64 of its flats registered “ownerless”; specific units actively reposted on Russian Telegram classifieds.
properties.source: OpenStreetMap Nominatim address lookup — not yet geocoded on the project spine itself

properties.name: pr. Lenina (Myru) 100
properties.summary: 44 flats registered “ownerless” in the same sweep as Stroiteley 108 and Sechenova 54.
properties.source: project spine, property_id 7242, geocode confidence high

properties.name: ul. Sechenova 54
properties.summary: Only 5% war damage — sold anyway. 23 flats registered “ownerless”; one phone number sells two separate units here.
properties.source: OpenStreetMap Nominatim address lookup — not yet geocoded on the project spine itself
